login.title: Fleet Driver
login.subtitle: Sign in to your assignments and messages
login.invalidPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
login.notDriver: This account cannot use the driver app.
login.networkError: Cannot reach the Fleet backend. Use the same Wi‑Fi as your computer, start `npm run dev`, and restart the app.

home.title: Home
home.subtitle: Today at a glance
home.noAssignmentsHint: Pull down to refresh or check again later.

dayStatus.noCheckin: Submit your morning check-in to start the day.
dayStatus.waitingReview: Check-in sent — waiting for office approval.
dayStatus.rejected: Check-in was rejected. Contact the office.
dayStatus.approvedStartJourney: Check-in approved. Tap Start journey below when you leave.
dayStatus.sharingWaitingGps: Journey started — waiting for GPS signal.
dayStatus.trackingActive: Live location is being shared with the office.

assignment.title: Assignment
assignment.subtitle: Details and actions
assignment.notFound: This assignment is no longer available. Pull to refresh on Today.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: {{count}} unread
messages.emptyMessage: Your office team will start a conversation when needed.
messages.accessDenied: You do not have access to this conversation.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Account & preferences
profile.name: Name
profile.languageHint: UI language and language for messages from the office.
profile.openTodayGpsHint: Start or end journey from the home tab
profile.openDocumentsHint: Scan or upload license, passport, ADR

requests.title: Requests
requests.subtitle: Leave and transport
requests.noOptions: No assignments today — enter IDs manually or try later.
requests.validationRange: End date must be on or after start date.
requests.validationRoute: Fill all route fields with valid date and HH:MM times.

attachments.label: Attachments
attachments.hint: Optional: photo, scan, or PDF (max {{max}} files).
attachments.pickHint: Doctor note, form, or route document
attachments.scanUnavailable: Scan requires a dev build (npm run ios), not Expo Go.

uniform.title: Work clothing confirmation
uniform.subtitle: Confirm receipt of company work clothing.

morningCheckin.title: Morning check-in
morningCheckin.subtitle: Submit today's check-in
morningCheckin.validationRequired: Plate, company, cargo, and quantity are required.
morningCheckin.successWithLocation: Check-in saved. Live location sharing is on.
morningCheckin.locationHint: Check-in is separate from GPS. Start live location from the home screen when you begin your route.
morningCheckin.alreadyExistsBody: You do not need to submit again. Go back to Today and tap «Start journey» on the GPS card.

handover.title: Vehicle handover
handover.subtitle: When your vehicle changed, upload exterior, tail lift, and interior photos
handover.vehicleChanged: Vehicle changed — 6 photos required (4 exterior, tail lift, interior)
handover.sameVehicle: Same vehicle as yesterday — no photos required
handover.scanUnavailable: Document scan requires a dev build (npm run ios). Not available in Expo Go.
handover.scanHint: Scan uses iOS VisionKit / Android ML Kit for straight, cropped photos.
handover.permissionRequired: Camera or photo library permission is required.
handover.cameraPermissionRequired: Camera permission is required for handover photos.
handover.cameraPermissionBlocked: Check-in cannot continue until camera access is granted.
handover.cameraOnlyHint: Live camera capture only — gallery uploads are not allowed.
handover.captureFailed: Could not capture photo. Please try again.

documentOnboarding.title: Required documents
documentOnboarding.subtitle: Upload your driving license and passport before using the app.
documentOnboarding.footerHint: You can add more documents later under Profile.

documents.title: My documents
documents.subtitle: Scan or upload licenses and certificates
documents.scanUnavailable: Document scan requires a dev build (npm run ios). Not available in Expo Go.
documents.scanHint: Use scan for straight, cropped photos (VisionKit / ML Kit).
documents.permissionRequired: Camera or photo library permission is required.
documents.cameraPermissionRequired: Camera permission is required to take photos.
documents.officeProvidedHint: The following are provided by the office and appear here once uploaded:

licenseCheck.title: License check
licenseCheck.subtitle: Digital Führerscheinkontrolle
licenseCheck.taskBody: Submit front, back, and selfie photos for compliance.
licenseCheck.cardHint: Place the license flat and capture the full card.
licenseCheck.selfieHint: Hold the license next to your face.
licenseCheck.loadError: Could not load license check status.
licenseCheck.nothingDueHint: You will be notified when the next 6-month check is due.
licenseCheck.frameGuide: Align the licence inside the frame (85.6 × 54 mm)
licenseCheck.qualityTooNarrow: Photo too small — minimum width 1280 px. Please retake closer.
licenseCheck.qualityTooDark: Photo too dark. Use better lighting and retake.
licenseCheck.qualityTooBlurry: Photo too blurry. Hold steady and retake.
licenseCheck.selfieFrameGuide: Hold your licence next to your face

fines.title: Traffic fines
fines.subtitle: Notices assigned to you
fines.emptyHint: You will see traffic fine notices here when the office assigns them.
fines.ackRequired: Please confirm you have read this fine notice.

departureCheck.title: Departure check
departureCheck.subtitle: Morning vehicle inspection
departureCheck.taskBody: Complete the mandatory morning vehicle check before starting work.
departureCheck.blocked: Vehicle has blocking defects — contact the office.
departureCheck.loadError: Could not load departure check status.
departureCheck.confirmLabel: I confirm the check is complete and accurate.

defects.title: Defects
defects.subtitle: Vehicle defects and confirmations
defects.noVehicle: No vehicle assignment today — cannot report.

cargoDamage.title: Cargo damage report
cargoDamage.subtitle: Submit cargo damage details
cargoDamage.validationFields: Cargo name, cargo owner and description are required.
cargoDamage.validationVehicle: Vehicle ID is required when assignment ID is not provided.
cargoDamage.submitFailed: Failed to submit cargo damage report.
cargoDamage.loadFailed: Failed to load cargo damage reports.

location.title: Live location
location.compactHint: Tap Start journey when you leave. End journey when finished.
location.webOnlyNative: Live GPS works on the iPhone or Android app only — not in the browser. Open the app on a phone, or use Profile → Location tracking.
location.manualHint: Tap “Start journey” when you leave. Location is only shared during this session (max. 12 h). Tap “End journey” when finished.
location.sharingStopped: Not sharing — tap Start journey when you leave
location.endConfirmMessage: Live location sharing will stop. You can start again later today if needed.
location.consentNeeded: Allow location to share while driving
location.sharingWaitingGps: Session active — waiting for GPS signal
location.permissionDenied: Permission denied — enable location in settings
location.noAssignmentToday: No assignment today — start journey is disabled.
